intro:
Allahabad (Prayagraj) is one of Uttar Pradesh's most significant cities — a spiritual, educational, and administrative centre at the confluence of the Ganga, Yamuna, and Saraswati. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 1,850+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Allahabad.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Allahabad's large and diverse residential spread — from Civil Lines to Naini — requires vendors who know every neighbourhood. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Allahabad. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Allahabad?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹3,000. 2 BHK typically ₹4,500 – ₹9,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Allahabad?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Allahabad and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
